description: Phase-5 loosening target (887 lines — worst offender). Deterministic `checks` pin trigger coverage, the day-plan output shape, the three-way worktree classification, and the degraded-signal + posture-hint invariants; `live` blocks describe the model runs a human executes.

live.prompt: what should I work on today?
expectations: plan-my-day triggers for a bare 'what to work on today' request without an explicit /plan-my-day command.
The plan groups items by urgency (Do first / Main focus / If you have time / Not today / Cleanup) rather than by data source.
Actionable items use `- [ ]` checkboxes; a `## Standup` section with Done/In Progress/Blockers is present.

live.prompt: plan my day across my worktrees
expectations: Each worktree is classified Active (dirty / ahead / open PR) vs Stale (no activity + last commit > 7 days); orphan tickets with no matching branch land under 'Tickets to pick up'.

checks.desc: emits explicit warning lines instead of guessing

live.prompt: plan my day (Slack is currently unreachable)
expectations: When a data source fails, the skill emits a ⚠ warning line and continues with what is available rather than fabricating or silently dropping data.

checks.desc: posture hint must trace to the user-curated retro, never be hardcoded

expectations: Any posture/scheduling tilt in the plan is derived from the monthly retro issue's own sections, not hardcoded day-of-week rules in the skill.

checks.desc: keeps an explicit Modes dispatch section

expectations: The 'close' argument routes to the close-day flow (not the default daily plan); 'standup' routes to the standup flow.
